solar_agent_assist.objective: Qualify and convert the solar opportunity while urgency is high.
stop_conditions: lead outcome becomes won or lost
operator status becomes closed or skip
prospect gives explicit do-not-contact or hard no
policy/compliance flags require manual review before send

playbook.objective: Qualify and convert the solar opportunity while urgency is high.

steps.title: Review the evidence pack and choose the opener
steps.instruction: Solar remains the strongest first offer because the economics and roof-fit proxies are better than the alternatives.
steps.success_signal: Rep or agent can explain why this lead is ranked now and what proof supports the move.
stop_conditions: lead outcome becomes won or lost
operator status becomes closed or skip
prospect gives explicit do-not-contact or hard no
policy/compliance flags require manual review before send

steps.title: Run the first touch on phone
steps.instruction: Solar remains the strongest first offer because the economics and roof-fit proxies are better than the alternatives.
steps.success_signal: Lead responds, books next step, or is marked contacted with a clear next action.
stop_conditions: lead outcome becomes won or lost
operator status becomes closed or skip
prospect gives explicit do-not-contact or hard no
policy/compliance flags require manual review before send

steps.title: If no reply, run the follow-up on sms
steps.instruction: Prioritize this stop and lead with solar.
steps.success_signal: Lead is qualified, scheduled, suppressed, or moved to a later dated follow-up.
stop_conditions: lead outcome becomes won or lost
operator status becomes closed or skip
prospect gives explicit do-not-contact or hard no
policy/compliance flags require manual review before send

steps.title: Capture the real outcome and economics
steps.instruction: After the touch, update status, outcome, objection, reason, and realized value so ranking and policy can learn.
steps.success_signal: Outcome record is complete enough to explain what happened and whether the lane made money.
stop_conditions: lead outcome becomes won or lost
operator status becomes closed or skip
prospect gives explicit do-not-contact or hard no
policy/compliance flags require manual review before send

objection_map.handling_angle: Lead with modeled annual savings, utility-rate pressure, and next-step options instead of opening on system price.
Use the best evidence-backed why-now trigger and ask for a light qualification, not a hard close.
Anchor on current bill pain, outage/flood risk, or permit history and ask for a scheduled follow-up window.

signal_summary.trigger_data_gaps: Missing external trigger layers: storm/hail events, outage reliability, equipment age or fuel type, permit/work history.

playbook.objective: Qualify and convert the roofing opportunity while urgency is high.

steps.title: Review the evidence pack and choose the opener
steps.instruction: Large roof and closeability make this worth a roof-first conversation even before full storm evidence is loaded.
steps.success_signal: Rep or agent can explain why this lead is ranked now and what proof supports the move.
stop_conditions: lead outcome becomes won or lost
operator status becomes closed or skip
prospect gives explicit do-not-contact or hard no
policy/compliance flags require manual review before send

steps.success_signal: Lead responds, books next step, or is marked contacted with a clear next action.
stop_conditions: lead outcome becomes won or lost
operator status becomes closed or skip
prospect gives explicit do-not-contact or hard no

steps.title: If no reply, run the follow-up on phone
steps.instruction: Prioritize this stop and lead with roofing. Current gap: Needs storm or hail history, roof-age evidence, and neighborhood replacement clustering before event-ready roofing targeting.
steps.success_signal: Lead is qualified, scheduled, suppressed, or moved to a later dated follow-up.

steps.title: Capture the real outcome and economics
steps.instruction: After the touch, update status, outcome, objection, reason, and realized value so ranking and policy can learn.
steps.success_signal: Outcome record is complete enough to explain what happened and whether the lane made money.
stop_conditions: lead outcome becomes won or lost
operator status becomes closed or skip
prospect gives explicit do-not-contact or hard no
policy/compliance flags require manual review before send

objection_map.handling_angle: Position as a fast second-look inspection with trigger-backed urgency and no-friction next step.
Use storm/flood/permit evidence to frame why delay increases risk and offer a narrow booking window.
Focus first on inspection findings and loss prevention before full replacement economics.

signal_summary.trigger_data_gaps: Missing external trigger layers: storm/hail events, outage reliability, equipment age or fuel type, permit/work history.
